title: Epic 2 — Engagement & Rewards
description: Engagement: rewards, avatars, streaks.

title: Feature 2.1 — Rewards & Progress
description: Sticker/badge system and daily streak encouragement.

title: Story 2.1.1 — Sticker / badge system
description: Award stickers/badges for milestones; visible in profile; persisted with consent.

title: Story 2.1.2 — Daily streak encouragement
description: Track daily play, show streak UI, and provide small bonuses for streaks.

title: Feature 2.2 — Customization & Avatars
description: Avatar selection and simple customization.

title: Story 2.2.1 — Simple avatar selection
description: Child chooses avatar from curated set; accessible UI; local session-only persistence.

title: Profile: Profile view
description: Persistent, accessible profile screen showing display name, avatar, badges, and session stats; accessible from app shell.
notes: Implemented Profile view: src/pages/Profile.vue and sidebar link; commit ccd4a1a

title: Profile: Edit profile
description: Edit display name and avatar; validate inputs and persist to session, persist across sessions only with parental consent.

title: Profile: Parental controls & consent management
description: Parental area in profile to manage consent, analytics and persistence toggles; explicit confirmation required.

title: Profile: Data export & deletion
description: Allow parents to export session summaries (PDF/CSV) and delete persisted profile data; prompt confirmations.

title: Profile: Multiple profiles & quick-switch
description: Support multiple local profiles and quick-switch UI to switch between profiles without losing progress.

title: Bug: missing avatar images referenced in Profile
description: Several avatar images referenced in  (e.g. /mockups/avatar-1.png) are missing from the repo; profile UI shows broken images. Add image assets or update paths.
notes: Added avatar SVG assets and updated Profile.vue to reference them; commit 5bee777

title: Bug: Profile view not persistent on refresh (navigates to Landing)
description: Profile is shown via in-memory state; refreshing the page resets app state and returns to Landing. Implement persistent routing or state persistence so refreshing keeps the user on Profile.
notes: Persist current view in App.vue via localStorage to survive refresh; commit 5bee777

title: Feature 4.1 — Landing page
description: Public landing page: hero, CTAs for Play Now and For Parents, COPPA notice, SEO metadata; responsive design.
notes: Implemented landing and onboarding: src/pages/Landing.vue, src/pages/Onboarding.vue, src/pages/ParentConsent.vue, src/App.vue. Commits: a7e7ba3, 0b66920.

title: Story 4.1.1 — Public landing page
description: Landing page communicates product value, target age 8–10, primary CTAs, COPPA notice, responsive hero with demo illustration, and basic SEO metadata.
notes: Implemented landing page (index.html, src/pages/Landing.vue). Commit 0b66920.

title: Persist: Session stats and recent summaries
description: User story: As a child (and parent), I want session statistics (rounds, accuracy) to be persisted so that progress summaries are available across sessions.
acceptance_criteria: 1) Session stats (rounds, accuracy) are recorded after each completed round. 2) Stats are saved to sessionStorage, and to localStorage only when parental consent is present. 3) Loading restores stats for display in Profile recent summary. 4) Aggregation for accuracy updates correctly.

title: Impl: persist session stats
description: Record stats after rounds, persist to sessionStorage and localStorage (consent-gated), and provide load API.

title: Integrate: Game -> persistence
description: Wire game end-of-round logic to update persistent stats via the persistence API.

title: Test: stats persistence tests
description: Add unit/integration tests for stats recording, aggregation and loading.

title: Impl: persist session stats
description: Record stats after rounds, persist to sessionStorage and localStorage (consent-gated), and provide load API.

title: Integrate: Game -> persistence
description: Wire game end-of-round logic to update persistent stats via the persistence API.

title: Test: stats persistence tests
description: Add unit/integration tests for stats recording, aggregation and loading.

title: Feature: Data export & deletion (parental controls / GDPR)
description: User story: As a parent, I want the ability to export and delete a child's data so I can back it up or comply with data deletion requests.
acceptance_criteria: 1) Export generates a single JSON file containing profile(s), stats, and consent flags. 2) Delete removes all user data from sessionStorage and localStorage after an explicit confirmation prompt. 3) Parental controls guard sensitive operations and logs an audit note.

title: Impl: export data JSON
description: Implement export routine that packages profiles, stats and consent flags into a JSON file for download.

title: Impl: secure delete workflow
description: Implement confirm prompt, deletion of storage keys, and optional audit log entry for deletion events.

title: Impl: export data JSON
description: Implement export routine that packages profiles, stats and consent flags into a JSON file for download.

title: Impl: secure delete workflow
description: Implement confirm prompt, deletion of storage keys, and optional audit log entry for deletion events.

title: Epic 1 — Core Learning
description: Core Learning: mini-games, feedback, progression (See BACKLOG.md).

title: Feature 1.1 — Mini-games (Basics)
description: Mini-games: counting, addition, difficulty progression.

title: Story 1.1.1 — Counting game
description: Child counts objects by tapping/dragging. Acceptance: count 1-20, immediate visual feedback, score summary, adaptive difficulty.
notes: Implemented pixel-match Counting Game: UI, per-object taps, summary card, accuracy, and adaptive difficulty.

title: Story 1.1.2 — Simple addition game
description: Addition problems with age-appropriate addends; multiple input modes; celebratory animation and hints; progress tracking.
notes: Blocked by test10-6nz (Tokens). UI visuals depend on token mapping.

title: Story 1.1.3 — Difficulty progression
description: System increases/decreases difficulty based on performance; configurable difficulty map.
notes: Blocked by test10-6nz (Tokens) for final visual tuning; logic can be prototyped earlier.

title: Feature 1.2 — Feedback & Retry Flow
description: Encouraging failure screens and hints flow.

description: Failure screen with Try again and Practice; accessible; resets or suggests practice.
notes: Blocked by test10-6nz (Tokens) for styling of failure screen; copy/flow can be designed earlier.

title: Story 1.2.2 — Immediate corrective hint
description: Show concise age-appropriate hint after incorrect answer without full solution.

title: Persist: Profile across sessions with parental consent
description: User story: As a child (or parent), I want my profile (display name, avatar, age, level) to persist across sessions when parental consent is given so that the app remembers progress and preferences.
acceptance_criteria: 1) Profile is saved to sessionStorage on save. 2) When parental consent (ks_parent_consent) is true, profile is persisted to localStorage. 3) Loading restores profile from sessionStorage or localStorage. 4) Export produces a JSON file containing profile and consent flag. 5) Delete removes profile from session and local storage and requires confirmation.

title: UI: Export/Delete profile data
description: Add Export and Delete controls to Profile UI; Export downloads JSON, Delete prompts confirmation and removes persisted data.

title: Impl: save/load profile (session + consent-gated localStorage)
description: Implement client-side save/load for profile; sessionStorage always, localStorage only when ks_parent_consent is true; expose API for other components.

title: UI: Export/Delete profile data
description: Add Export and Delete controls to Profile UI; Export downloads JSON, Delete prompts confirmation and removes persisted data.

title: Test: profile persistence unit tests
description: Add unit tests to cover save/load/export/delete behavior and consent gating for profile persistence.

title: Impl: save/load profile (session + consent-gated localStorage)
description: Implement client-side save/load for profile; sessionStorage always, localStorage only when ks_parent_consent is true; expose API for other components.

description: Add Export and Delete controls to Profile UI; Export downloads JSON, Delete prompts confirmation and removes persisted data.

title: Test: profile persistence unit tests

title: Chore: Add automated tests for persistence behavior

acceptance_criteria: 1) CI runs unit tests covering profile and stats persistence. 2) Integration test verifies export and delete flows and consent gating. 3) Tests included in repo and run by default on CI.

title: Feature: Multiple profiles & profile switching UI
description: User story: As a household with multiple children, I want multiple profiles and a profile switcher so each child gets a separate progress record and avatar.
acceptance_criteria: 1) User can create, rename, select and delete multiple profiles. 2) Switching profiles updates the active profile in the app and persists selection across reloads (consent gated). 3) UI exists to manage profiles and displays avatar and name.

title: Task: Server-backed persistence migration plan
description: User story: As an engineer, I want a migration plan from client-only storage to server-backed persistence so we can centrally store and sync profiles and stats.
acceptance_criteria: 1) Document data model for profiles and stats. 2) Design API endpoints for GET/POST/export/delete user data. 3) Provide migration steps from client-only storage to server-backed storage with rollback plan and privacy/security considerations.
